body:
## Summary
- Add a committed `.agent/sepo-version.json` install metadata file.
- Add a small typed reader/validator and `print-sepo-version` CLI with deterministic default path lookup.
- Document the SemVer policy and install source-identity model, with focused tests.

This is a simpler alternative to #128 for #127 / #74. It intentionally avoids the stricter release-policy enforcement, exhaustive git-ref validation, unknown-field rejection, and cwd fallback behavior.

## Tests
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`
- `node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/sepo-version.test.js`
- `node .agent/dist/cli/print-sepo-version.js --json`
- `env -u BASE_BRANCH -u BASE_PR npm --prefix .agent test`
- `git diff --check`
title: Add simplified Sepo version metadata foundation
